title: Net-New Story Gap Review — 2026-05-17 (HRREC-82977, Tier A)
content:
Executive summary (for PM)

  • Run tier: A (full contract). Gap Likelihood reflects Verdict + suggested missing BDD only.
  • Jira ingest: Primary bodies from repo evidence JSON dated 2026-05-16; Salomon jira_details_tool + epic JQL re-checked 2026-05-17 for key inventory. user-jira-ghe getTicketDetails returned session errors this run—Salomon remained the live fallback.

Top 5 gaps (epic)

  • Purge and reporting stories (92011, 92013) need authoritative platform scope before QA scales.
  • Unread/read and concurrent recruiter models (91997, 91999) still fork—decide product truth before automation.
  • Merge plus identity (92005, 92015) needs one shared matrix before QA scales duplicate scenarios.
  • Draft is local-only across discard/navigation/REST error stories—copy and router hooks must tell one data-loss story.

Top 5 strengths (epic)

  • Bounce copy matrix (92003) is unusually mature for an early epic.
  • Agency confidentiality story (92008) seeds a real IDOR security scenario.
  • Opt-in and domain gating (91985, 91979) are written in plain compliance language.
  • Send with polling and double-send guard (91994) shows operational awareness.
  • Tenant lifecycle knobs (92012) anchor to an actual numeric tenant attribute in XO search.

Epic-level notes

  • Overlapping SSP grow/width behaviour appears across 91948, 91980, 92001—pick a single breakpoint owner.
  • Attachment stories split UI-only, outbound validation, inbound malware—keep error ownership explicit between recruiter vs candidate views.
  • My Conversations vs bell routing for inbound replies (91975) should be validated against Edit Tenant Setup – Notifications guidance for conversational messaging.

Cross-initiative pattern hints (WhatsApp — inspiration only)

Hard disclaimers: Same surface, different channel; different backend/OE; bugs are delivery pain signals for WhatsApp, not proof email is broken; inspiration only—never parity claims.

Corpus line (manifest-only): Frozen pattern corpus dated 2026-05-16 in repo reference file for companion WhatsApp Story+Bug keys. No live WhatsApp Jira pull for companion keys this run.

  • HRREC-90268 / HRREC-92062 — disable send / block typing while send is in flight: ask whether email compose disables input during REST in flight.
  • HRREC-89979 — fail-early vs silent-until-send on limits: ask whether email surfaces resource limits when opening compose, not only on send.
  • HRREC-90306 / HRREC-84389 — merge identity: ask whether email participant/from lines survive duplicate merge cleanly.

Possible missing stories (suggestions only)

Holistic suggestions only—this skill does not create Jira tickets. PRD was not auto-loaded for this generator run; ideas are Jira- and epic-narrative grounded.

ThemeWhy it mattersSuggested story idea
Autosave / server draftsMultiple stories assume local-only draftsFuture epic: optional autosave once REST supports it—explicitly out of MVP unless reopened
Search / global discovery92008 covers direct ID but not global search leakageSpike: recruiter global search and notification deep links never surface agency-isolated threads in error
Admin comms namingTenant admins configure conversational routing under SMS-named typesEnablement story: rename or dual-label notification configuration tasks for email-inclusive wording
